mistral/magistral-medium.description: Premier reasoning model excelling in domain-specific, transparent, and multilingual reasoning. Supports text-to-text, reasoning, and multimodal capabilities.
mistral/magistral-medium.notes: Flagship reasoning model. Context window: 128K. Proprietary – available via API only.

mistral/magistral-small.description: Open-weight reasoning model, excelling in domain-specific, transparent, and multilingual reasoning.
mistral/magistral-small.notes: Open-weight model. Pricing not publicly published for this variant. Available for self‑hosting under the Mistral Research License.

mistral/mistral-large.description: Best overall performance for most tasks. Supports text-to-text capabilities.
mistral/mistral-large.notes: Context window: 128K. Batch processing receives a 50% discount. Proprietary model – available via API only (not open-sourced).

mistral/mistral-medium-3.5.description: Frontier-class multimodal model optimized for agentic and coding use cases. State-of-the-art performance for coding tasks.
mistral/mistral-medium-3.5.notes: Released as open weights under a Modified MIT license. Context window: 256K.

mistral/mistral-small-4.description: Powerful hybrid model unifying instruct, reasoning, and coding capabilities in a single model. 119B parameters with 6.5B active. Open SOTA, multimodal, multilingual.
mistral/mistral-small-4.notes: Released March 16, 2026 under Apache 2.0 license. Context window: 256K. Cost-efficient option.

mistral/mistral-small-3.2.notes: Deprecation scheduled. Alternative: Mistral Small 4. Context window: 32K.

mistral/devstral-2.description: Open-weights agentic coding model for autonomous software engineering.
mistral/devstral-2.notes: Flagship coding model. Released under a modified MIT license. Context window: 128K.

mistral/devstral-small-2.description: Best lightweight, open model for coding agents. Supports coding, agentic, text-to-text, lightweight, and multimodal capabilities. Version 25.12.
mistral/devstral-small-2.notes: Deprecation scheduled. Alternative: Devstral 2. Released under Apache 2.0 license. Context window: 128K.

mistral/codestral-25.08.notes: Released under Mistral AI Non-Production (MNPL) License.

mistral/voxtral-small.description: State-of-the-art performance on speech and audio. First model with audio input capabilities for instruct use cases.
mistral/voxtral-small.notes: Context window: 32K. Supports audio input (billed per minute – see API pricing). Token pricing applies to text input and output.

mistral/voxtral-mini-transcribe-2.notes: Audio input pricing: $0.003/min (standard) and $0.006/min (realtime). Open‑weights under Apache 2.0 license.

mistral/voxtral-mini.notes: Deprecation scheduled. Alternative: Voxtral Mini Transcribe 2.

mistral/voxtral-tts.description: State-of-the-art text-to-speech generation and voice cloning. Supports 9 languages, streaming with ~90ms time-to-first-audio.
mistral/voxtral-tts.notes: Audio generation: $16 per 1M characters (equivalent to $0.016 per 1k characters). Zero-shot voice cloning.

mistral/pixtral-large.notes: Pricing not publicly published. Context window: 128K. Released under Mistral Research License.

mistral/pixtral-12b.notes: Input: $0.15 per MTok. Output pricing not specified.

mistral/mistral-ocr.description: Optical character recognition model for document extraction and understanding.
mistral/mistral-ocr.notes: Document extraction pricing: $4 per 1000 pages (standard), $2 per 1000 pages (batch). Annotated pages: $5 per 1000 pages.

le-chat.description: AI assistant with chat, search, creation, and Vibe for code.

la-plateforme.description: Serverless platform to build and tune with Mistral models as API endpoints.

developer-api.description: Programmatic access to Mistral models with pay-as-you-go token pricing.

vibe.description: Agentic coding assistant in your terminal. Available on Le Chat Pro and Team plans with generous usage.

agents.description: AI agents for autonomous task execution.

web-search.description: Real-time web search integration within Le Chat.

image-generation.description: AI-powered image creation. Pro and Team plans offer increased generation limits.

ocr.description: Document extraction and understanding. Available via API.

voice.description: Speech and audio capabilities including transcription and TTS.

fine-tuning.description: Customize models on your own data.

batch-api.description: Asynchronous processing with 50% discount on standard rates.

embeddings.description: Text embedding models for semantic search and retrieval.

workspace.description: Team collaboration and shared workspaces on Team and Enterprise plans.

plans.notes: Limited access to Vibe, latest models, chat, search, creation. Limited image generations.
Higher limits across chat, more messages and web searches, more extended thinking and deep research reports, expanded Mistral Vibe capacity, chat and email support. Student discount available.
Per-user pricing. Annual billing available: $19.99/user/month (paid annually). Priority support.
Custom enterprise pricing with custom SLAs, dedicated support, and private deployments. Contact sales for details.
Usage-based token pricing through La Plateforme. Free tier: $5 credits every 30 days for new accounts. Batch processing gets 50% discount.

models.notes: Frontier-class multimodal, optimized for agentic and coding. Context: 256K.
Token pricing for text input/output. Audio input is billed separately at $0.004/min.
Vision-language model. Output pricing not specified.

batch-api.description: Asynchronous processing with 50% discount on standard per-token rates.

free-tier.description: New accounts receive $5 of credits every 30 days for experimentation.

ocr-pricing.description: Document extraction pricing. Annotated pages: $5 per 1000 pages.

voxtral-tts.description: Text-to-speech and voice cloning. Equivalent to $0.016 per 1k characters.

apiPricing.notes: All prices in USD per 1M tokens unless otherwise noted. Batch processing receives 50% discount. Free tier available for API experimentation.

notes: Mistral AI operates a dual model: consumer subscriptions (Le Chat Free, Pro, Team) and API access (La Plateforme). Pro is $14.99/month. Team is $24.99/user/month ($19.99 with annual billing). Enterprise has custom pricing. Models include Magistral (reasoning), Devstral (coding), Voxtral (speech/audio), Pixtral (vision), and Mistral (general-purpose). Mistral Small 4 (March 2026) and Mistral Medium 3.5 are the latest open models. Batch API provides 50% discount on standard rates. Licensing varies: Modified MIT (Magistral Small, Mistral Medium 3.5, Devstral 2), Apache 2.0 (Mistral Small 4, Devstral Small, Voxtral), MNPL (Codestral), and Mistral Research License (Pixtral Large, Ministral 8B). Proprietary models (Magistral Medium, Mistral Large) are available via API only.
